title: ModernArch FA Extension
description: Fresh Animations support for ModernArch pack
body:
This extension adds support for facial animations (eyes, eyebrows, mouth) when using [ModernArch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modernarch) with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations). It is still under development and does not yet include all animations. Order to use: ![Packs order (1. This extension pack, 2. ModernArch and 3. Fresh Animations)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1a25b1940a2202a988f400fac3a8e3a07313f16.png)
Check out our Patreon for higher resolutions, get updates sooner, and more benefits:
